name: Uma Salada Portuguesa- Mixed Green Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Large Purple Onion, thinly sliced and separated into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oil and lemon juice in a screw-top jar.
Season with salt and pepper.
2. Secure the top on the jar and shake until the dressing is well combined.
3. Wash lettuce and watercress, then drain well.
Tear into small pieces.
4. Toss the dressing through the salad greens and arrange on a serving platter.
5. Arrange tomato slices, onion rings, and olives in a circular pattern.
6. Sprinkle with chopped parsley before serving. Serve immediately.
